summary: Senior Avionics & Maintenance professional with over 16 years of Pakistan Air Force experience in maintenance operations for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C and JF-17 Thunder platforms. Expertise in fleet readiness management, field engineering leadership, and international OEM coordination with SAAB (Sweden) and CADI (China). Holds MS in Avionics Engineering with deep hands-on knowledge of radar systems, air defense weapons systems, and aircraft modification programs.

experience.title: Maintenance Support Engineer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed avionics maintenance engineering for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet of 9 aircraft, covering radar, mission systems, and airframe subsystems
Developed and executed maintenance schedules with staggering plans to ensure multi-aircraft fleet readiness
Conducted technical fault diagnosis and coordinated component-level repair and replacement activities
Supervised maintenance teams during field operations to maintain aircraft availability for surveillance missions

experience.title: Senior Engineering Officer, Crotale Weapons System
bullets: Commanded engineering operations for Crotale short-range air defense (SHORAD) weapons system
Maintained operational readiness of SAM battery including launcher, radar, fire control, and missile subsystems
Led field maintenance teams ensuring weapons system availability during operational deployments
Managed maintenance staggering and resource allocation across multiple system components

experience.title: PMO Officer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed program activities for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet sustainment covering 9 aircraft
Coordinated maintenance contracts, spare parts logistics, and system upgrade programs with SAAB (Sweden)
Tracked fleet availability metrics and produced mission readiness reports for program leadership

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Designed and integrated avionics subsystems for military aircraft platforms
Conducted system-level testing, verification, and validation of integrated avionics suites
Supported production line engineering for avionics installation and wiring harness integration

certifications: Engineering Project Management Specialization — Rice University
